description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 七一長周末加強列車服務

2024-06-28T16:32:00.CONTENT_EN:
MTR are enhancing the train service on 6 lines during the long weekend from 29 June to 1 July for the HKSAR Establishment Day. 
- Island Line, South Island Line, East Rail Line, Tung Chung Line, Tuen Ma Line, Disneyland Resort Line
- Around 400 extra train trips

Travel offers will be provided on 1 July:
- Free travel on Light Rail and MTR Bus for all
- Free MTR rides for children.
2024-06-28T16:32:00.CONTENT_CN:
6條鐵路綫於6月29日至7月1日長周末加強列車服務 :

- 共增加約400班車

此外，7月1日會提供乘車優惠：
- 所有乘客免費乘搭輕鐵及港鐵巴士
